caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on "Industrial Machine Learning: Horizontally Scalable Data Pipelines with Airflow." The presenter, Alejandro Saucedo, is introduced as the CTO of Exponential Technologies, Chairman of The Institute for Ethical AI & ML, a member of the Broader AI Expert Group at the European Commission, and part of the Advisory group TeensInAI. He stands behind a podium, delivering his talk while a slide behind him displays his credentials and contact information (A@E-X.IO). The setting suggests a professional and educational environment aimed at discussing advanced topics in machine learning and data pipelines.
